ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Amanda Millea, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Court waived the sanctions ordered on APR-28-2015 in the amount of $400.00. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
